# Anoop Kurup

> I fix sales for founder-led services businesses. Sales systems for consulting, agency, training, and professional-services firms: one packaged offer, proven against real prospects, with a weekly motion that produces conversations.

Anoop Kurup is a solo sales-systems consultant based in Bangalore, working with founders one engagement at a time. The funnel: start free with the Sales Scorecard, diagnose with the Pipeline Reality Check, then install the system with CLEAR.

## Start here

- [Sales Scorecard](https://www.anoopkurup.com/scorecard): Free 10-question, 3-minute self-assessment of how predictable your pipeline is. No email required to see your score.
- [Pipeline Reality Check](https://www.anoopkurup.com/pipeline-reality-check): ₹25,000 done-for-you diagnosis of your last 12 months of deals, delivered in one week. Fee credited to CLEAR.
- [CLEAR](https://www.anoopkurup.com/clear): The sales system installed with you over ~3 months — one packaged offer, proven against real prospects, a working outreach motion.
- [About Anoop Kurup](https://www.anoopkurup.com/about): Background, approach, and why I stay in the room.
- [Contact](https://www.anoopkurup.com/contact)

## Writing

- [Blog](https://www.anoopkurup.com/blog): Practical writing on positioning, offer architecture, pricing, lead generation, and sales systems for founder-led services firms.
- [The Positioning Matrix for B2B Services](https://www.anoopkurup.com/blog/positioning-matrix-b2b-services)
- [Offer Architecture for a Predictable Lead Engine](https://www.anoopkurup.com/blog/offer-architecture-predictable-lead-engine)
- [Marketing Systems to Scale Beyond Referrals](https://www.anoopkurup.com/blog/complete-guide-marketing-systems-scale-beyond-referrals)
- [Fixing the MQL–SQL Handshake](https://www.anoopkurup.com/blog/mql-sql-handshake-fixing-drop-off)
